name: Yukio
description:
I noticed nobody really makes Yukio bots, so I decided to make one myself!

I put a lot of effort and time into this bot, so I hope y'all enjoy it

Scenario 1: You're going to be his new roommate

Scenario 2: Somehow you're trapped in his world

Scenario 3: your own scenario!

If the bot speaks for you, it's probably because of the default LLM.If the bot speaks for you, it's probably because of the default LLM, so it's better to use a proxy instead of JanitorLLM
creator: Sorakkj69
